content:
# How to Create AI-Generated Meditation Videos in 2026

Meditation videos help people find peace, but creating them requires both audio and video production skills. AI makes it accessible to everyone!

Check out our [[link:/category/Video|Video category]] for more AI tools.

---

## Step 1: Write Your Meditation Script

Use [[link:/tools/23|Rytr]] to create calming meditation scripts.

### Rytr for Meditation
- **Guided meditation templates**: Proven structures
- **Calm tone**: Set the perfect mood
- **Progressive relaxation**: Guide listeners to peace

**Try Rytr Free**: {{AFFILIATE_RYTR}}

---

## Step 2: Generate Meditation Audio

Use [[link:/tools/97|ElevenLabs]] for soothing narration.

### ElevenLabs for Meditation
- **Calm voice options**: Choose peaceful narration styles
- **Slow pace**: Perfect for relaxation
- **Emotional tone**: Warm and comforting delivery

**Try ElevenLabs**: {{AFFILIATE_ELEVENLABS}}

---

## Step 3: Create Visuals

Use [[link:/tools/1|Midjourney]] for peaceful meditation visuals.

### Midjourney for Meditation
- **Nature scenes**: Mountains, oceans, forests
- **Abstract patterns**: Calming geometric designs
- **Consistent style**: Maintain visual peacefulness

**Try Midjourney**: https://midjourney.com

---

## Step 4: Combine Everything

Use [[link:/tools/51|VEED]] to edit and finalize your meditation video.

**Try VEED**: https://veed.io

---
